content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To: Opinion Request Meeting Participants

Date: Jan. 6, 1977

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Ted Prim

Subject: Item for discussion.

When a filer incorrectly states the period covered on his Statement of Economic Interests, is he always required to amend the statement? If not, what are the standards for determining when no amendment is needed.

TP:jo
